mapper.insert:
SELECT partner_seq.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO partner ( partner_id, member_id, partner_name, contact_name, contact_phone, partner_intro, status, created_at, business_number, accommodation_type ) VALUES ( #{partnerId}, #{memberId}, #{partnerName}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{partnerIntro}, 'PENDING', SYSDATE, #{businessNumber}, #{accommodationType} )
mapper.select: SELECT status FROM partner WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY created_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT partner_id as partnerId, member_id as memberId, partner_name as partnerName, contact_name as contactName, contact_phone as contactPhone, partner_intro as partnerIntro, status, reject_reason as rejectReason, created_at as createdAt FROM partner WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY created_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
